title: Immortality
description: This mod allows you to toggle immortality on your own worlds and servers easily!
body:
# Immortality Mod

![Requires Fabric API](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Frequires%2Ffabric-api_64h.png&n=-1) 
![Requires Fabric Language Kotlin](https%3A%2F%2Fwsrv.nl%2F%3Furl%3Dhttps%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403.3.1%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Frequires%2Ffabric-language-kotlin_64h.png%26n%3D-1)

**Become truly unkillable.**

Immortality Mod introduces the concept of true immortality to your Minecraft worlds or servers. Whether you're exploring dangerous terrain, battling powerful mobs, or just want a peaceful experience without worrying about death, this mod ensures you always survive.

> **Server and client only!** This mod must be installed on the server to function. It will not work on client-side alone, because that'd be cheating! — *except* in singleplayer or LAN worlds where you are the host.

### Features
- Grants players complete immortality!
- Compatible with most mods!

### Usage
To use this mod, you must be in a server you own, in singleplayer, or in a co-op LAN world. Once in-game, press the default key **F8** to enable immortality — all incoming damage will be ignored. Mobs can still see you and attempt to attack, but they won't be able to harm you.
